request_payload.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security frameworks leave dangerous gaps. The recent attacks in [City] showed how critical it is to empower our agencies with better tools to act decisively. While some worry about civil liberties, we can't afford delays when lives are at stake. The 2024 National Security Review found that 87% of thwarted attacks required expanded domestic powers. We need to give our protectors the authority they need to keep us safe - responsibly, but without unnecessary red tape. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
